purpose: Provide the evidence ledger for Law Firm OS: append-only audit events, tamper-evident sequencing, retention, legal hold, privacy-safe query, admin access review, and compliance export.
research_anchors: NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5 Audit and Accountability
NIST SP 800-92 computer security log management
AWS S3 Object Lock WORM retention and legal hold
OpenTelemetry semantic conventions for trace/log correlation
AICPA Trust Services Criteria for SOC 2 readiness
CSA Cloud Controls Matrix logging and monitoring
non_goals: Hermes does not own product audit records.
Claude Code does not approve production audit deletion or retention release.
Audit records are not edited in place; corrections are appended as new events.
Audit payloads are not a dumping ground for full documents, secrets, credentials, or unnecessary personal data.

conditionally_required_fields.when: event touches matter, document, billing, settlement, AI retrieval, or client portal objects
event touches a document, citation, rendition, OCR result, data room item, or AI retrieval source
event records allowed, denied, approval_required, review_required, or break_glass access
event changes retention, legal hold, deletion eligibility, purge queue, or compliance export retention

release_requires: Claude C03 cross-check for policy changes

review_questions: Can any audit event be edited or deleted without appending a correction event?
Can any tenant infer another tenant's audit rows, counts, actors, or object names?
Can legal hold or retention be bypassed by an admin, integration, migration, or support flow?
Can payloads leak unnecessary personal data, raw document text, secrets, or credentials?
Can hash-chain gaps, duplicate sequence numbers, and clock-skew anomalies be detected?
Can compliance export prove custody without making Hermes or Claude a product authority?

entry_readiness_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 entry contract and domain model opening units as no-write, synthetic-only readiness evidence before audit implementation continues.

service_interface_readiness_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 domain-model terminal rows and service-interface opening rows as no-write, synthetic-only readiness evidence before audit service implementation continues.

service_interface_workflow_evidence_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 service-interface test/golden cases, Hermes evidence packet rows, and Claude review packet opening rows as no-write, synthetic-only workflow evidence before audit review packet continuation.

claude_packet_sensitive_boundary_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 Claude review packet sensitive tenant, matter, permission, audit hint, idempotency, lock, and persistence rows as no-write, synthetic-only reference boundaries.

api_ui_reference_readiness_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 service terminal, API interface, permission/audit API, fixture, and UI opening rows as no-write, synthetic-only reference readiness before UI surface continuation.

ui_workflow_continuation_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 audit/compliance UI workflow continuation rows as no-write, synthetic-only, non-rendering references for permission badges, audit hints, denied/review states, responsive layouts, keyboard focus, fixtures, and leakage guards.

ui_permission_fixture_binding_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 audit/compliance UI permission/audit binding and synthetic fixture opening rows as no-write, synthetic-only, non-rendering references for permission badges, audit hints, denied/review states, fixture opening, layout/focus, and leakage guards.

ui_fixture_evidence_reference_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 audit/compliance UI fixture/evidence terminal rows and P05 fixture workflow opening rows as no-write, synthetic-only, non-rendering references for golden cases, denied/review cases, cross-tenant guards, audit hints, security trimming, AI retrieval or analytics case references, evidence packets, and handoff.

fixture_terminal_boundary_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 audit/compliance fixture manifest, golden/failure tests, Hermes evidence, Claude prompt, closeout handoff, no-real-data, stable ID, replay command, and base tenant fixture rows as Risk A no-write descriptor boundaries.

fixture_permission_matrix_reference_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 audit/compliance synthetic fixture continuation, fixture evidence/review closeout packet, and opening permission matrix reference rows as Risk C no-write descriptors for later permission/audit binding work.

permission_matrix_workflow_boundary_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 audit/compliance permission matrix denied/cross-tenant/leak tests, secondary workflow matrix rows, and permission/audit binding route rows as Risk B no-write descriptors for later security trimming and fixture continuation.

permission_matrix_security_fixture_bound.purpose: Bind the RP03 audit/compliance security trimming, audit-event expectation, permission fixture, permission test, and synthetic fixture view/search rows as Risk A no-write descriptors before the larger CP00-147 fixture continuation pack.

permission_matrix_failure_taxonomy_refer.purpose: Bind the RP03 audit/compliance permission matrix continuation rows and failure taxonomy reference rows as Risk C no-write descriptors before the CP00-148 sensitive failure boundary pack.

failure_boundary_sensitive_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 audit/compliance blocked-claim receipt, failure fixture, failure tests, audit failure hint, Hermes failure evidence, Claude edge-case prompt, human escalation note, and secondary workflow failure taxonomy opening as Risk A no-write descriptors.

failure_workflow_continuation_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 audit/compliance secondary workflow and permission/audit binding failure continuation rows as Risk B no-write descriptors.

failure_fixture_sensitive_boundary_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 audit/compliance permission/audit terminal and synthetic fixture opening failure rows as Risk A no-write descriptors.

failure_evidence_continuation_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 audit/compliance failure continuation and Hermes evidence packet opening rows as Risk C no-write descriptors.

evidence_workflow_fixture_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 audit/compliance evidence workflow terminal, permission/audit evidence binding, and synthetic fixture opening rows as Risk B no-write descriptors.

review_closeout_continuation_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 audit/compliance evidence terminal and review closeout opening rows as Risk C no-write descriptors.

review_sensitive_boundary_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 audit/compliance review-sensitive permission, audit, test, UI, risk, routing, verdict, and human approval rows as Risk A no-write descriptors.

review_terminal_closeout_pack.purpose: Bind the RP03 audit/compliance review terminal closeout, Hermes evidence packet, Claude review packet, and RP04 handoff rows as Risk C no-write descriptors.
